scripts.eas:credentials:citizen: cd apps/citizen-mobile && npx eas-cli credentials -p android
scripts.eas:credentials:patrol: cd apps/patrol-mobile && npx eas-cli credentials -p android
scripts.eas:build:citizen:preview: cd apps/citizen-mobile && npx eas-cli build -p android --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:patrol:preview: cd apps/patrol-mobile && npx eas-cli build -p android --profile preview
scripts.android:prebuild:citizen: CI=1 corepack pnpm --filter @signal/citizen-mobile exec expo prebuild --platform android --clean
scripts.android:prebuild:patrol: CI=1 corepack pnpm --filter @signal/patrol-mobile exec expo prebuild --platform android --clean
scripts.android:apk:citizen: CI=1 corepack pnpm --filter @signal/citizen-mobile exec expo prebuild --platform android --clean && node scripts/patch-android-build.js apps/citizen-mobile && cd apps/citizen-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd ../../.. && cp apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/signal-citizen-debug.apk
scripts.android:apk:patrol: CI=1 corepack pnpm --filter @signal/patrol-mobile exec expo prebuild --platform android --clean && node scripts/patch-android-build.js apps/patrol-mobile && cd apps/patrol-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd ../../.. && cp apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/signal-patrol-debug.apk
scripts.android:release:citizen: CI=1 corepack pnpm --filter @signal/citizen-mobile exec expo prebuild --platform android --clean && node scripts/patch-android-build.js apps/citizen-mobile && cd apps/citizen-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=production ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../../.. && cp apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk apps/citizen-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/signal-citizen-release.apk
scripts.android:release:patrol: CI=1 corepack pnpm --filter @signal/patrol-mobile exec expo prebuild --platform android --clean && node scripts/patch-android-build.js apps/patrol-mobile && cd apps/patrol-mobile/android && NODE_ENV=production ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../../.. && cp apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk apps/patrol-mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/signal-patrol-release.apk
